entity.summary: Form Network concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange with residual current liquidity and historical swap volume but no recent fee activity in the reviewed registry snapshot.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Fibonacci Dex as a Form Network CLMM DEX and reports residual current TVL and cumulative DEX volume, while 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour fees are zero. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Fibonacci Dex project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: Fibonacci Dex metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies Fibonacci Dex as a Form Network CLMM DEX and reports residual current TVL plus cumulative DEX volume while recent fee windows are zero, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: Fibonacci Dex discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Fibonacci Dex as a Form Network decentralized exchange.
